---
title: "1b: Genome Download Report"
---

## Overview

This report summarizes the genome download step. Genomes identified in the
1a filtering step are downloaded from the BV-BRC API. Failed and empty
downloads are removed, and metadata is updated to reflect only successfully
downloaded genomes.

## Download Summary

```{python}
import pandas as pd

summary = pd.read_csv("../temp/1b_genome_summary.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})
print(f"Genomes successfully downloaded: {summary.shape[0]}")
summary.head(10)
```

```{python}
metadata = pd.read_csv("../temp/1b_genome_metadata.csv", dtype={"genome_id": str})
print(f"Metadata rows: {metadata.shape[0]}")
```
